name: down
description: Stops containers and removes containers, networks, volumes, and images

options.name: --rmi
options.description: Remove images. Type must be one of: 'all': Remove all images used by any service. 'local': Remove only images that don't have a custom tag set by the `image` field

name: -v
--volumes
options.description: Remove named volumes declared in the `volumes` section of the Compose file and anonymous volumes attached to containers

options.name: --remove-orphans
options.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

name: -t
--timeout
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds. (default: 10)
